subcodes.first_line: O thou whom God hath reserved for the promulgation of the Covenant! That which thou hadst written hath been perused. Time and again [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ادخره الله لنشر المیثاق آنچه مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید بارها در
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @unity; oneness of humanity, @call to action, @words vs deeds
